use rayon::prelude::*;

// GOOD: handle errors gracefully in parallel closures
fn scan_files(paths: &[PathBuf]) -> Vec<ScanResult> {
    paths.par_iter()
        .filter_map(|path| {
            let content = std::fs::read_to_string(path).ok()?;
            let parsed = serde_json::from_str::<Document>(&content).ok()?;
            Some(scan_document(&parsed))
        })
        .collect()
}

fn process_items(items: &[Item]) -> Vec<Output> {
    items.par_iter()
        .filter_map(|item| {
            match item.parse_value() {
                Ok(value) => Some(transform(value)),
                Err(e) => {
                    log::warn!("skipping item: {}", e);
                    None
                }
            }
        })
        .collect()
}
